description: Agentic workflow to fetch BigEarthNet images from June 2017, classify them with the ResNet-32 LCC classifier, and plot the LCC classes for Non-irrigated arable land.
label: BigEarthNet Image Classification and Plotting Workflow

participants.description: Agent to fetch BigEarthNet images for a specified date.
participants.label: DataAgent

config.name: data_fetch_agent
config.description: Fetches BigEarthNet images from the specified date.
config.system_message: You will fetch BigEarthNet images from June 2017.

participants.description: Agent to run LCC classification on fetched images using ResNet-32.
participants.label: VisionAgent

config.name: classification_agent
config.description: Classifies images into land cover categories using the ResNet-32 classifier.
config.system_message: You will analyze the fetched images using the ResNet-32 LCC classifier.

participants.description: Agent to plot classified land cover classes of specific category.
participants.label: MapAgent

config.name: plotting_agent
config.description: Plots the land cover classes of category 'Non-irrigated arable land' on a scatter map.
config.system_message: You will plot the classified LCC classes for Non-irrigated arable land.
